facts.text: 28 Feb 2026: US-Israel 'Operation Epic Fury' strikes on Iran killed Supreme Leader Khamenei; Iran retaliated on Israel and US Gulf bases (UAE, Qatar, Bahrain).
Strait of Hormuz declared closed 4 Mar - 17 Apr 2026 (mines, ship attacks); ~20% of global oil disrupted; US blockaded Iranian ports 13 Apr - 29 May.
facts.source: Wikipedia 2026 Strait of Hormuz crisis; CRS R45281

facts.text: Brent surged past $120 (+51% in March, among largest monthly jumps on record); ~$94 on 10 Jun 2026, +35% y/y.

Ceasefire faltering: 7-8 Jun worst Israel-Iran exchanges in months (strikes near Tehran, Isfahan, Tabriz; missiles toward Ramat David); Iranian/proxy attacks on UAE, Kuwait, Saudi, Bahrain, Jordan shipping/territory.
IMF WEO Apr-2026 'Global Economy in the Shadow of War': 2026 growth 3.1% (cut from 3.3%), inflation 4.4% rising; adverse scenario 2.5%/5.4%, severe 2.0%/>6%.
World Bank: energy prices +24% in 2026, biggest surge since 2022; developing-economy growth 3.6% (-0.4pp), inflation 5.1% (+1pp); food = 43% of LIC consumption.
facts.source: World Bank Commodity Outlook Apr-2026; IMF blogs

facts.text: Ukraine war in 5th year; Russia holds just under 1/5 of territory; May Victory-Day 3-day ceasefire + 1,000-POW swap; Zelenskyy direct-talks offer declined by Putin (early Jun); Putin says war 'coming to an end' (10 May).
facts.source: Al Jazeera May-Jun 2026; Cambridge peace monitor

facts.text: US: Trump approval 38.1% (May) from 47% at inauguration; independents 34%; Q1 GDP +2.0%, PCE inflation 4.5%; Democrats lead economic trust first time since 2010.
China: lowest growth target in decades (4.5-5%); 3rd straight year of deflation; property investment -17.2% (2025); ~80M unsold/vacant homes; record $1.19tn trade surplus 2025.
facts.source: CNN NPC Mar-2026; Fortune; Goldman Sachs

facts.text: PRC 'Justice Mission 2025' blockade-simulation exercise (29-30 Dec); naval deployments vs Balikatan 2026; Taiwan $24.8bn 8-year special defense budget (May 2026), defense to ~3.3% GDP.

AI agents jumped 12% -> ~66% on OSWorld; frontier models exceed human baselines on PhD-science/competition-math; first large-scale AI-orchestrated espionage campaign (80-90% autonomous, PRC-attributed); AI attacks +72% y/y; 85% of orgs report deepfake threats.
facts.source: Stanford AI Index 2026; PwC/Trend Micro 2026; Anthropic research

facts.text: 2026 tracking 2nd-warmest year (~1.47C best estimate); WMO 82% El Nino May-Jul 2026, possibly strong; record-low Arctic winter ice; 150M+ acres burned YTD.
Europe: all 32 NATO members hit 2% GDP defense (2025); Hague target 3.5% core; military spend +14% y/y; debt: Greece 150.9%, Italy 135.3%, France 113.1% of GDP; AfD surging.
India FY2025-26 growth 7.7% (fastest major economy); each +$10/bbl oil widens CAD ~0.4-0.5% GDP; CAD risk at 14-year high.

analogs.name: 1973-74 oil embargo vs 2026 Hormuz shock
analogs.similar: war-triggered Gulf supply cut into existing inflation
analogs.different: more diversified 2026 supply; inflation-targeting central banks
analogs.outcome: stagflation decade; substitution wave broke OPEC pricing by 1986
analogs.lesson: the lasting effect is the 5-10y substitution wave, not the recession

analogs.name: Death of Stalin 1953 vs Iran succession 2026
analogs.similar: sudden death of system arbiter; security services as kingmakers
analogs.different: killed by foreign action - humiliation fused into succession
analogs.lesson: external de-escalation usually follows internal consolidation (12-24mo); danger is the contest itself

analogs.name: Korea 1953 armistice vs Ukraine 2026-27
analogs.similar: attritional stalemate; exhausted patrons; talks during fighting
analogs.different: nuclear principal; EU accession as anchor; no China-scale intervener
analogs.lesson: freeze comes when both sides expect renewed war to cost more than status quo - approaching, not arrived

analogs.name: 1930s tariff blocs vs 2025-26 fragmentation
analogs.similar: tariff escalation by largest economy; surplus-country deflation
analogs.different: floating FX; services trade; no demand collapse yet
analogs.outcome: trade contraction deepened depression, fed extremism
analogs.lesson: lethal step was the financial-crisis interaction (1931), not tariffs alone

analogs.name: Railway mania/dot-com vs AI boom 2024-26
analogs.similar: real GPT; capex outrunning revenue; narrative valuations
analogs.different: funded by incumbent cash flows, not retail leverage
analogs.lesson: a 2027-28 AI correction would slow, not stop, diffusion; dividend arrives 5-15y after hype

early_warning.metric: IRGC appointments; Assembly of Experts schedule

ME_war_1y.mechanism: Succession contest -> factional resolve signaling -> tit-for-tat exchanges -> one crosses casualty threshold -> retaliation spiral. Model quarterly escalation hazard {esc} (decaying as consolidation proceeds).
ME_war_1y.analog: Death of Stalin 1953: external calm followed internal victory; danger concentrated in the contest window.
ME_war_1y.counter: The 7-8 Jun exchange may BE the enforcement mechanism of the ceasefire (shadow-war equilibrium), not its failure.
failure: new Supreme Leader consolidates by Q4

Hormuz_closure_by_end2027.mechanism: War resumption -> Iran's only strategic lever is the strait -> mining/boarding -> closure. Direct hazard {hz}/q from ceasefire, higher from war regime.
Hormuz_closure_by_end2027.analog: Tanker War 1984-88: months-long disruption, US convoying; closure attempts are costly and end.
Hormuz_closure_by_end2027.counter: Iran demonstrated closure once and re-opened under blockade pressure - deterrent may now be spent.

UA_formal_ceasefire_by_end2027.mechanism: Mutual exhaustion + patron fatigue -> armistice along line of contact; hazard rises with time (fatigue ramp + Russia stance agent).
UA_formal_ceasefire_by_end2027.analog: Korea 1953: armistice when both sides expected renewed war to cost more than freeze.
UA_formal_ceasefire_by_end2027.counter: Putin rhetoric may be sanctions-relief shaping before a 2027 offensive; regeneration data will tell.
failure: US aid collapse changing Kyiv's calculus

TW_blockade_by_2030.mechanism: Capability window 2030-32 + US two-theater strain -> quarantine as sub-war coercion test; hazard x1.4 while US engaged in ME (opportunism agent).
TW_blockade_by_2030.analog: Berlin blockade 1948: sub-war coercion testing alliance resolve - relieved without great-power war.
TW_blockade_by_2030.counter: PRC economic fragility argues for delay; blockade is one-shot leverage with massive self-harm.

Global_recession_lt2p5_by_2028.mechanism: Only first-order global channel: energy price x duration -> real income squeeze + policy tightening -> sub-2.5% annual growth (IMF adverse zone).
Global_recession_lt2p5_by_2028.analog: 1973 and 1979: both global recessions came via oil duration, not the wars themselves.
Global_recession_lt2p5_by_2028.counter: Buffers (reserves, substitution, China stimulus capacity) have so far capped every spike within 2 quarters.

Dem_House_Nov2026.mechanism: Misery index (inflation + growth gap) -> incumbent punishment; logistic link calibrated to 38% approval, 4.5% PCE baseline.
Dem_House_Nov2026.counter: War rally-round effect if conflict reignites pre-November could compress the wave.
failure: rapid disinflation + ceasefire dividend by October

red_team_qualitative: ME hazards anchored on one week of headlines; base rate n~6 for post-decapitation resumption - honest band 35-60%, not a point.
Durable-settlement probability may underweight humiliation-revenge dynamics (Versailles pattern).
Taiwan probabilities imply more knowability than single-actor opacity permits; read as order-of-magnitude.
Bull case underweighted: settlement + armistice by mid-2027 yields falling energy, 3%+ growth, AI capex boom.
Vendor-sourced cyber statistics (72% growth, 36k probes/sec) are detection-biased; directional only.
20,000 paths of hand-set parameters is coherence, not measurement - which is exactly why theta is now TRAINED on resolved events (see novelty/).
critical_unknowns: Who rules Iran by Dec 2026 - and whether they need external victory or calm
Putin 'end of war' rhetoric: decision or deception
True PRC internal Taiwan-readiness timeline vs announced exercises
AI productivity diffusion: 5-year or 15-year GPT curve
El Nino lands moderate or super
US two-theater readiness in fact vs doctrine
Detection-bias share of AI-cyber growth statistics
Chinese household savings behavior under deflation
Whether deepfakes change votes or merely degrade trust
Where this cycle's hidden leverage (LTCM analog) sits
